sources.issuing_organisation: American Diabetes Association Professional Practice Committee
sources.exact_document_title: 3. Prevention or Delay of Diabetes and Associated Comorbidities: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026
sources.jurisdiction: United States professional standard; international evidence requiring UAE adaptation
sources.population: People with prediabetes or increased risk of type 2 diabetes, with age, pregnancy and comorbidity qualifiers.
sources.clinical_setting: Clinician-led diabetes-risk monitoring and prevention review.
sources.applicability_note: Exact for documenting risk-factor review, clinician-reviewed glycaemic monitoring, person-centred goals and follow-up. It does not establish prediabetes or generate lifestyle or pharmacologic treatment.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 3.1–3.2 — monitoring for progression
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician-reviewed A1C, glucose or other glycaemic monitoring and individualized follow-up frequency without generating a target or diagnosis.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 3.3–3.7 — person-centred risk and prevention discussion
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting weight and cardiometabolic risk context, patient goals, discussed prevention-program context and clinician-entered follow-up; no advice is auto-generated.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations 3.8–3.13 — individualized pharmacologic and cardiovascular-risk context
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician review of age, BMI, prior gestational diabetes, laboratory trajectory, adverse-effect context and cardiovascular risk. Medication names, doses and treatment recommendations are excluded.
